Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -25,10 +25,13 @@
 echo ""
 echo "==> Push to master detected. Running build_and_copy.sh..."
 echo ""
 
-# Redirect stdin from the terminal so the script's interactive prompts work.
-bash "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/build_and_copy.sh" < /dev/tty
+# Reassign stdin to the terminal so the build script's interactive prompts work.
+# Falls back silently if /dev/tty is unavailable (e.g. CI or GUI clients).
+exec < /dev/tty 2>/dev/null || true
+
+bash "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/build_and_copy.sh"
 EXIT_CODE=$?
 
 if [[ $EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]]; then
     echo ""

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
#!/bin/bash
# pre-push hook — runs build_and_copy.sh when pushing to master.
# Stored in .githooks/ (tracked). Activate once per clone with:
#   git config core.hooksPath .githooks

REMOTE="$1"
# URL="$2"  # available if needed

REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"

PUSH_TO_MASTER=0

# stdin contains lines: <local_ref> <local_sha> <remote_ref> <remote_sha>
while read -r local_ref local_sha remote_ref remote_sha; do
    if [[ "$remote_ref" == "refs/heads/master" || "$remote_ref" == "refs/heads/main" ]]; then
        PUSH_TO_MASTER=1
        break
    fi
done

if [[ $PUSH_TO_MASTER -eq 0 ]]; then
    exit 0
fi

echo ""
echo "==> Push to master detected. Running build_and_copy.sh..."
echo ""

# Redirect stdin from the terminal so the script's interactive prompts work.
bash "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/build_and_copy.sh" < /dev/tty
EXIT_CODE=$?

if [[ $EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]]; then
    echo ""
    echo "==> build_and_copy.sh failed (exit $EXIT_CODE). Push aborted."
    exit 1
fi

echo ""
echo "==> Build and deploy succeeded. Proceeding with push."
exit 0
